title: Shanghai Sidequests — bucket list during the China chapter
html:
Shanghai Sidequests — bucket list during the China chapter

Source: 2024-09-05 Apple Note. Tiny bucket-list during the china chapter — 6 things Yahir wanted to do beyond the everyday Shanghai routine.

TL;DR

Six aspirational items from early in the Shanghai stretch:

  • Shanghai Sharks game (CBA basketball)
  • War movie at the Grand Theatre
  • great wall (Beijing trip)
  • lincoln jazz center — Wynton Marsalis's Jazz at Lincoln Center has a Shanghai venue; aligns with Yahir's jazz interest
  • terracotta warriors (Xi'an day trip)
  • Shanghai Tesla Gigafactory tour

Most of these are weekend-trip-scale items not local to Shanghai — Beijing (Great Wall), Xi'an (Terra Cotta Warriors). Suggests Yahir was using Shanghai as a base to do broader China exploration.

Open questions

  • Did any of these actually happen? (Look for follow-up notes from Beijing/Xi'an.)
  • The Sharks game — basketball connection points to a casual sports interest worth tracking.

Related

  • shanghai
  • china chapter
  • lincoln jazz center
